description_long: This is an electric guitar with a single-cutaway body design, featuring a striking striped pattern in shades of pink and black. The body is solid and contoured, with a glossy finish that highlights the wood grain beneath the painted stripes. The guitar is equipped with metallic hardware, including tuning pegs, bridge, and control knobs, all of which are visible in the images. The neck is straight and connects to a headstock that appears to have a classic three-per-side tuning peg arrangement. The back of the guitar shows a control cavity cover, and the overall build suggests a robust, high-quality instrument suitable for urban performances or street musicians. The instrument's design is both modern and eye-catching, making it a standout piece in any urban setting.
description: A solid-body electric guitar with a pink and black striped finish, metallic hardware, and a classic single-cutaway design. The glossy surface and bold pattern make it visually striking.
description_view_0: The guitar is shown from the front, displaying the striped pink and black body, control knobs, pickups, and the full neck with headstock.
description_view_1: A side profile view reveals the guitar's thickness, the contour of the body, and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: The back of the guitar is visible, showing the striped pattern, control cavity cover, and the rear of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Another side profile, opposite to view 1, highlighting the edge contours and the alignment of the neck with the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic three-per-side tuning peg arrangement, no visible logo, standard contoured shape
